subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! It hath been reported that from the hand of the Cup-Bearer of Fate thou hast quaffed draughts of utmost bitterness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله از قرار مسموع از دست ساقی قدر جرعهاای در نهایت تلخی آشامیدی و زهر
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
